creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #3)
The fix in bug 274848 was applied (on 2023-11-11).
So it is safe to remove DOCS_CONFLICTS_BUILD=cmark in all the llvm* ports.
I've been using llvm* ports with that removed successfully in llvm builds while cmark and py-CommonMark (and py-recommonmark) installed.

I'll open a separate bug if this comment here in this old bug doesn't garner any attention, but I thought I would just mention it here for starters.
